amendment_disclosure: The parent screen produced at most four development trades because a multi-bar opening range was compared directly with one-bar ATR. The economic results and 2018-2023 sample counts were observed. Therefore the variance-scaled version treats all of 2018-2023 as research, leaves 2024 as the next untouched validation year, and leaves 2025 as final candidate-specific holdout.

execution_contract.scaled_opening_range: Opening range width divided by ATR56 and by sqrt(range_bars).
execution_contract.compression_gate: Scaled opening range must be no greater than max_scaled_range.
execution_contract.confirmation: Completed signal-bar close beyond the opening boundary plus breakout_buffer_atr times ATR56.
execution_contract.entry: Next M15 bar open after the completed confirmation bar.

stage_contract.research: Select one global winner using only 2018-2022 development and 2023 internal validation; apply the original DEV/2023 gate.
stage_contract.validation_2024: Open only for the frozen research receipt; require at least 25 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
stage_contract.holdout_2025: Open only with a matching VALIDATION_PASS receipt; require at least 25 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
